mapper.select: SELECT room_id, user_a_id, user_b_id, group_id, last_message_id, last_message_text, last_message_at, created_at FROM chat_rooms WHERE user_a_id = LEAST(#{loginUserId}, #{opponentUserId}) AND user_b_id = GREATEST(#{loginUserId}, #{opponentUserId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms (group_id, user_a_id, user_b_id, created_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, LEAST(#{userAId}, #{userBId}), GREATEST(#{userAId}, #{userBId}), NOW())
INSERT INTO chat_room_members (room_id, user_id, unread_count, is_exited, rejoined_at, created_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}, 0, FALSE, NULL, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.room_id, u.user_id AS opponent_user_id, u.nickname AS opponent_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS opponent_profile_image_url FROM chat_rooms r JOIN users u ON u.user_id = CASE WHEN r.user_a_id = #{loginUserId} THEN r.user_b_id ELSE r.user_a_id END WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId}
SELECT CASE WHEN user_a_id = #{loginUserId} THEN user_b_id ELSE user_a_id END FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT m.message_id, m.sender_id, gm.group_nickname AS sender_nickname, m.message_text, m.created_at, CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{loginUserId} AND m.message_id > ( SELECT COALESCE(crm.last_read_message_id, 0) FROM chat_room_members crm WHERE crm.room_id = #{roomId} AND crm.user_id = #{opponentUserId} ) THEN FALSE ELSE NULL END AS unread_marker FROM chat_messages m JOIN users u ON u.user_id = m.sender_id JOIN chat_rooms r ON r.room_id = m.room_id JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = r.group_id AND gm.user_id = m.sender_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} AND ( #{rejoinedAt} IS NULL OR m.created_at >= #{rejoinedAt} ) ORDER BY m.message_id ASC

SELECT r.room_id, CASE WHEN r.user_a_id = #{loginUserId} THEN r.user_b_id ELSE r.user_a_id END AS opponent_user_id, gm.group_nickname AS opponent_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS opponent_profile_image_url, r.last_message_text, r.last_message_at, m.unread_count FROM chat_rooms r JOIN chat_room_members m ON r.room_id = m.room_id JOIN users u ON u.user_id = CASE WHEN r.user_a_id = #{loginUserId} THEN r.user_b_id ELSE r.user_a_id END JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = r.group_id AND gm.user_id = CASE WHEN r.user_a_id = #{loginUserId} THEN r.user_b_id ELSE r.user_a_id END WHERE m.user_id = #{loginUserId} AND m.is_exited = FALSE AND r.last_message_at IS NOT NULL AND (m.rejoined_at IS NULL OR r.last_message_at >= m.rejoined_at) ORDER BY r.last_message_at DESC, r.room_id DESC
SELECT room_id FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId} FOR UPDATE
